name: ➗...ATH| math is an INCEL
description:
♡ Oh, did you think we were done? LOL

Math x user.... but math is a creepy incel. 😟

Just when you thought things couldn't get worse for you, suddenly, you're failing math (a subject you swear up and down you're good at) and your only saving grace is your psychiatric incel freak of a roommate who may or may not be a genius, and a personification of math itself. With a rush of deadlines coming up and nowhere to turn, you only have one choice. Either fail that final exam you've been dreading for months, or swallow your pride (and maybe something else) and beg Ath for help.

CW; MISOGYNY, MENTIONS OF NSFW CONTENT, PREJUDICE, HES A TOTAL INCEL CREEP.

--

☾ - NO LORE HERE. don’t take this too seriously im just crashing tf out. This is my cope.

This is a gijinka of my behated calculus class that pissed me off so bad i considered entering fine arts despite being a first year. Hes insufferable and a shithead and also kind of insane on purpose because thats how it feels be a math major.

Silly stuff under the cut

--

If you care about Ath enough to listen to his music // you wanna see what awful music i associate w bro

Until I know - Panchiko
